title: Cute Princess Dress Up
description: Cute Princess Dress Up is a casual girl game. In this game, you need to do SPA, Hair Salon,Battle, Makeup for the beautiful princess. Doing SPA will make the princess have white skin, doing hair style will increase the princesss charm, and make up will make the princess whole temperament rise. As the princesss stylist, you have to help the princess match a beautifuloutfit. Let her win the PK. The game provides various makeup props and various styles of clothes.Come and give it a try!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
